generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure puts national security at risk? A recent report found that 68% of cyber-attacks on U.S. systems originate from state-sponsored actors exploiting these vulnerabilities. It's time to prioritize strategic autonomy and invest in domestic solutions. #NationalSecurity #TechIndependence
